n: 2026-04-21: Updated PR #987 to fix strip_copyright - now checks Matchers::Copyright::REGEX separately from all_rights_reserved regex (Copilot review concern properly addressed). Added edge-case test for 'All rights reserved without copyright notice'. Split multi-expectation tests per RuboCop. RuboCop clean, 341 content_helper_spec tests pass, 2819 total (27 pre-existing CLI failures). Re-labelled #655 with bug+needs investigation (labels had disappeared). Monthly summary #974 updated.
